Class CookieUtil

java.lang.Object
com.aptcoursework.utils.CookieUtil
public class CookieUtil extends Object
Utility class for handling HTTP cookie operations.

This class provides helper methods to create, retrieve, and delete cookies in a web application using HttpServletRequest and HttpServletResponse.

It centralizes common cookie-related logic such as:

  • Adding secure cookies to the response
  • Retrieving cookie values from requests
  • Deleting cookies by setting their expiry to zero

All cookies created through this utility are configured with a root path ("/") and HTTP-only flag where applicable to improve security and accessibility across the application.

Author:
Heaven Gurung, Sugam Rana Magar

  • Constructor Details

    • CookieUtil

      public CookieUtil()

  • Method Details

    • addCookie

      public static void addCookie(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse response, String name, String value, int maxAge)
      Utility method for creating and adding an HTTP cookie to the response.

      This method creates a new Cookie with the specified name and value, configures its maximum age, sets it to be accessible across the entire application using "/", and marks it as HTTP-only for improved security.

      The cookie is then added to the HttpServletResponse, allowing it to be stored in the client's browser.

      Parameters:
      response - the HTTP response to which the cookie will be added
      name - the name of the cookie
      value - the value of the cookie
      maxAge - the maximum age of the cookie in seconds

    • getCookieValue

      public static String getCookieValue(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest request, String name)
      Retrieves the value of a specific cookie from the HTTP request.

      This method searches through all cookies present in the HttpServletRequest and returns the value of the cookie that matches the given name.

      If no cookies are present or no matching cookie is found, the method returns null.

      Parameters:
      request - the HTTP request containing the cookies
      name - the name of the cookie to retrieve
      Returns:
      the value of the matching cookie if found; otherwise null

    • deleteCookie

      public static void deleteCookie(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse response, String name)
      Deletes a cookie from the client's browser.

      This method creates a new Cookie with the specified name and sets its value to an empty string. The maximum age is set to 0, which instructs the browser to immediately remove the cookie.

      The cookie path is set to "/" to ensure it matches the original cookie scope and is properly removed.

      Parameters:
      response - the HTTP response used to send the deletion command to the client
      name - the name of the cookie to be deleted
